title: ESC 2021/2023 Heart Failure Management CDS Rules
title_zh: ESC 2021/2023 心衰竭管理指南 - 臨床決策支援規則
description: Recommendations for GDMT, device therapy, and medication safety in heart failure based on ESC 2021 Guidelines with 2023 Focused Update
source: 2021 ESC Guidelines for the diagnosis and treatment of acute and chronic heart failure, 2023 Focused Update

HFrEF.name: Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction
HFrEF.name_zh: 心射出分率降低型心衰竭

HFmrEF.name: Heart Failure with Mildly Reduced Ejection Fraction
HFmrEF.name_zh: 心射出分率輕度降低型心衰竭
HFmrEF.treatment: GDMT may be considered, SGLT2i recommended

HFpEF.name: Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction
HFpEF.name_zh: 心射出分率保留型心衰竭

gdmt_pillars.description: Guideline-Directed Medical Therapy - Four Pillars for HFrEF
gdmt_pillars.description_zh: 指引建議藥物治療 - HFrEF 四大支柱

pillars.name: ARNI/ACEi/ARB
pillars.note: ARNI preferred over ACEi/ARB if tolerated

pillars.name: SGLT2 Inhibitor
pillars.note: Recommended for all HF regardless of EF or diabetes status

medications_to_avoid.description: Medications to avoid or use with caution in heart failure
medications_to_avoid.description_zh: 心衰竭患者應避免或謹慎使用的藥物

avoid.reason: Cause fluid retention, worsen HF, impair renal function

avoid.name_zh: 非二氫吡啶類鈣離子阻斷劑
avoid.reason: Negative inotropic effect, may worsen HFrEF
Cause fluid retention, increase HF hospitalization risk

recommendations.text: In patients with HFrEF, treatment with an ARNI, beta-blocker, MRA, and SGLT2i is recommended to reduce mortality and HF hospitalization.
recommendations.text_zh: HFrEF 患者建議使用 ARNI、β阻斷劑、MRA 及 SGLT2i 四大支柱藥物，以降低死亡率及心衰竭住院風險。

recommendations.text: An SGLT2 inhibitor (dapagliflozin or empagliflozin) is recommended for patients with HFmrEF or HFpEF to reduce the risk of HF hospitalization and cardiovascular death.
recommendations.text_zh: HFmrEF 或 HFpEF 患者建議使用 SGLT2i (dapagliflozin 或 empagliflozin)，以降低心衰竭住院及心血管死亡風險。

recommendations.text: Regular monitoring of renal function and potassium is recommended in patients on RAAS inhibitors and MRAs, especially when initiating or up-titrating.
recommendations.text_zh: 使用 RAAS 抑制劑及 MRA 的患者應定期監測腎功能及血鉀，尤其在起始或調整劑量時。

recommendations.text: An ICD is recommended to reduce the risk of sudden death and all-cause mortality in patients with symptomatic HF (NYHA class II-III) with LVEF ≤35% despite ≥3 months of OMT.
recommendations.text_zh: 症狀性心衰竭 (NYHA II-III) 且 LVEF ≤35%，經過至少3個月最佳藥物治療後，建議評估植入式心臟去顫器 (ICD) 以降低猝死風險。

recommendations.text: Ivabradine should be considered to reduce HF hospitalization and CV mortality in symptomatic patients with LVEF ≤35%, in sinus rhythm with resting HR ≥70 bpm, who are on maximum tolerated beta-blocker dose.
recommendations.text_zh: HFrEF (LVEF ≤35%) 合併竇性心律、休息心率 ≥70 bpm，且已使用最大耐受劑量 β阻斷劑的患者，應考慮加用 Ivabradine 以降低心衰竭住院及死亡風險。

recommendations.text: NSAIDs, non-dihydropyridine CCBs (diltiazem, verapamil), and thiazolidinediones should be avoided in patients with HF as they may worsen symptoms and outcomes.
recommendations.text_zh: 心衰竭患者應避免使用 NSAIDs、非二氫吡啶類鈣離子阻斷劑 (diltiazem、verapamil) 及 TZD 類降血糖藥，因可能惡化症狀及預後。
